ocr_findings.description: The memory hierarchy diagram (showing CPU → キャッシュメモリ → 主記憶装置 → 補助記憶装置 with 高速小容量 / 低速大容量 labels) is captured as an image placeholder; diagram node labels are not in OCR text. The surrounding prose and exam-tip box describe the hierarchy adequately.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering cache memory role and semiconductor memory (半導体メモリ). All key definitional text faithfully transcribed including the bold exam-tip callout about cache memory and the full 半導体メモリ definition paragraph. The memory hierarchy diagram's node labels are missing (image placeholder) but the text sufficiently conveys the concept. Label 'content' is correct.
